content.en:
"This is it!"

Ye Tian came to the place where the Origin Realm Sea bordered the end of the Realm, that is, within the Origin Void Circle.

The Origin Void Circle is the place that connects the Origin Boundary Sea and the Boundary River, and Ye Tian was still very curious about why there was an Origin Void Circle between the Origin Boundary Sea and the Boundary River.

It stands to reason that the Boundary River is a tributary of the Origin Boundary Sea, and there should be no barriers.

But now, he finally understood.

It turns out that the boundary river is opened up, and the Origin Void Circle is equivalent to the protection circle of the Origin Boundary Sea in the end of the realm, and the Origin Void Circle blocks the end of the realm, not the boundary river.

At this time.

There are a lot of eternal masters here.

Ye Tian even saw a lot of acquaintances, and even saw his three senior brothers.

"I've seen three senior brothers!"

Ye Tian flew over and said hello.

"Little junior brother is here too!" said the Black Decay Controller with a smile.

Ye Tian nodded slightly: "Fourth Senior Sister wants to open up the Boundary River, I naturally want to come!"

The Ancient Demon Master took a look at it and praised it: "The strength of the junior brother has improved very quickly, he has been promoted to the Nine Realms level master in such a short period of time, and he has not really begun to absorb the origin of the Refining Origin Boundary Sea, this kind of progress is too fast, much faster than I was at the beginning!"

"Senior Brother Ancient Demon has praised it, it's just that the strength is improving quickly, it's nothing, compared to the three senior brothers, I'm still too far behind!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

"Okay, let's not talk about this, now is the day when Senior Sister Snow opens up the Boundary River, although it is unlikely that someone will come to destroy it, but we still have to take care of it as senior brothers. The Black Rotten Ruler said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian, the Ancient Demon Controller, and Jiang You's Controller all nodded.

At this time, there are two senior brothers who have opened up the boundary river here, and Ye Tian can just ask about opening up the boundary river.

Although he is still very early to open up the boundary river, he might as well find out first.

"Senior Brother Black Decay, Senior Brother Ancient Demon, how did the Boundary River open up, is there anything to pay attention to?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Ancient Demon Master said, "Junior Brother, if you want to know about the Boundary River, I can also tell you about it. It is not an easy task to open up the Boundary River, first of all, you must attract a part of the origin power of the Origin Boundary River and pour it into the area you want to open up, this is only the first step. The second step was to tear a hole and pour the energy of the Origin Boundary Sea into this area, forming the Boundary River Region. The first two steps are not difficult, but the difficult step is how to stabilize the boundary river and form a real world of self-circulation, not just a model, this step is difficult. Then it was necessary to use the Dao created by the Nine Realm-level controllers themselves as the origin to suppress the origin of the Boundary River. At this time, in order to improve the success rate, you can use some auxiliary treasures to integrate into the origin of the boundary river and join the evolution of the boundary river itself. At this time, it will bear the test from the unknown, and once the test fails, it will be hit hard. "

"What is the test?"

Ye Tian was curious.

The Ancient Demon Master pointed to the end of the world: "From the test of the end of the world, opening up the boundary river is actually forcibly transforming a region of the end of the world into the edge of the world, so it is equivalent to seizing the territory of the end of the world. Maybe the end of the world also has its own rules, so when opening up the boundary river, it will be suppressed by the rules of the end of the world, and if you can't resist it, you will fail. Therefore, the sooner you open up the Boundary River, the better, so you need auxiliary things to accelerate the evolution, which is equivalent to increasing the success rate! In short, the weak Eternal Controller must not open up the Boundary River, otherwise he will not even be able to withstand the suppression of the rules of the Boundary, and the body of direct control will be shattered. "

"I see, thank you Senior Brother Ancient Demon for your advice!

Ye Tian thanked.

The Ancient Demon Master smiled and said, "Little junior brother is polite, in fact, you will know sooner or later, I just said it in advance." Remember, don't go ahead of time to open up the boundary river, or the consequences will be serious!"

"Senior Brother Ancient Demon, do you mean me? I can't help it, my potential and strength can't work, so I can only take a shortcut to try. And when I first started practicing, the system wasn't completely perfected, and everyone was trying to find new paths, so I was just trying to do it. Jiang You said.

"Senior Brother, I'm not talking about you, I'm just reminding Junior Brother!" the Ancient Demon Master hurriedly said.

For the senior brother, he still has a lot of respect.

After all, when he was weak, Senior Brother helped him many times, and he had a good relationship with Senior Brother Jiang You.

At this time.

The Snow Maiden is making preparations, such as dividing the area to arrange a large array, and the area covered by this large array is the area of the Boundary River.

Think of how vast a boundary river is, and the average eternal master will have to fly for a long time just by flying, if he doesn't shuttle, you can imagine what a huge area it is.

And the formation that enveloped such a huge area would take a long time to arrange, and the resources and materials consumed would be innumerable.

It can be said that if you are poor, you are not qualified to open up the boundary river.

Time passed slowly, and many Eternal Masters were watching the busy figure of the Snow Maiden Master.

It was a long time before the Snow Maiden Controller established a large array, enveloping a region of the Realm and consuming countless material resources.

"Almost, you can officially start opening up the boundary river step by step!"

The Snow Maiden Master muttered.

"Open !!!"

The Snow Maiden's controller tore apart the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, grabbed it with one hand, and grabbed a large amount of the Origin Realm Sea's Origin Power and introduced it into this area.

Airplanes!!!!!

The void is turbulent, and a boundary river origin void has opened up, but it is very unstable.

Then, the will clone of the Snow Maiden's controller struck out, tearing through the barrier of the Origin Realm Sea, turning a large amount of energy into a torrent and pouring into this area.

The Origin Realm Sea can continuously absorb the energy of the Realm, so the energy is endless, and even if it is taken away, it will have no effect on the Origin Realm Sea.

As a torrent of energy poured into the interior of the Great Array, the rudiments of the Boundary River gradually began to take shape.

But at this point, there's nothing here.

There is no Eternal Realm, there is no Boundary River Island, and some are just some resource treasures in this area.

A long time has passed, and the large array area has almost been filled with the energy of the Origin Boundary River, so it has the appearance of the Boundary River, but it is still unstable.

At this time, the Snow Maiden Master began the third and most important step, which was to suppress this Boundary River Void with the origin of its own Creation Dao, and then let it continue to evolve and form its own Boundary River Rules, which could operate on its own.

In this way, it can be regarded as the real boundary river!
